## Act in developer mode
## Rules to create a component in this project:
- this project is a boilerplate that will be customized and fine implemented
- keep things simple and extendable
- alway use components from the uikit (take as example [ui-kit-page]nextjs-commerce/app/[locale]/ui-kit/page.tsx)
- use nextjs last guidelines 
- focus on performances: prefer server over client
- focus on accesibility: alway check if components are ada complaiant
